Title: Date a Live
Actors: Nobunaga Shimazaki, Jessie James Grelle, Marina Inoue
Plot: A boy named Itsuka Shido meets a spirit girl who has been rejected by a devastated world. The girl, who Shido names Tohka, happens to have wiped out much of humanity 30 years ago, and now she is back. The only way to stop her is to date her.
Language: English, Japanese, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese
